code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_WorkerNode] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {Infra_RedisCache] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {Infra_WorkerNode] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {Infra_RedisCache] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {Infra_WorkerNode] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {Infra_IngressController] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {Infra_RedisCache] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {Infra_WorkerNode] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {Infra_RedisCache] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个移动端图像处理应用的性能自适应状态机。核心思路是：从WorkerNode启动后，先评估设备能力，然后动态选择四种运行模式。
四种模式具体怎么划分？是按设备档次来对应吗？比如低端机、中端机这种？
对，Low-end走UltraFastMode，Mid-range走FastMode，High-end走BalancedMode，Premium设备用HighQualityMode。每个模式内部要有完整的处理流水线。
好的，我先把顶层结构画出来。UltraFastMode用RedisCache，内部走QuarterResolution→BasicFaceDetection→MinimalProcessing→LowBatteryUsage→PerformanceMonitoring。
UltraFastMode没问题。FastMode也用WorkerNode，分辨率提到HalfResolution，检测升级到标准FaceDetection，加上BasicNSFWDetection。
FastMode画好了。BalancedMode作为推荐模式，我想用EtcdCluster做基础设施，走FullResolution和CompleteFaceDetection，功能最全。
BalancedMode还要加上ContentDensityAnalysis吗？不，那个放HighQualityMode。BalancedMode到GenderClassification就够了，然后PerformanceMonitoring。
等等，我刚才把ContentDensityAnalysis画进BalancedMode了，那是HighQualityMode的特性。我修正一下，BalancedMode到GenderClassification就结束。
HighQualityMode用RedisCache，走EnhancedResolution→AdvancedFaceDetection→EnhancedNSFWDetection→DetailedGenderClassification→ContentDensityAnalysis→HighBatteryUsage。这是旗舰体验。
四个模式都画完了。接下来PerformanceMonitoring要进入ContinuousMonitoring状态，里面做全维度资源监控。
ContinuousMonitoring之后要有三个分支：PerformanceGood保持现状，PerformanceIssues降级，ResourcesAvailable则升级性能。
DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance内部需要详细状态吗？还是直接到AdaptiveAdjustment？
需要详细状态。DegradePerformance用IngressController，走ReduceDetectionFrequency→LowerResolution→DisableNonEssentialFeatures→IncreaseCacheUsage→OptimizeMemoryUsage。
DegradePerformance画好了。ImprovePerformance也用RedisCache，反向操作：IncreaseDetectionQuality→HigherResolution→EnableAdditionalFeatures→ReduceCacheDependency→EnhancePrecision。
三个分支最后都汇聚到AdaptiveAdjustment，里面做ApplyChanges→TestNewSettings→ValidatePerformance→UpdateConfiguration，然后返回ContinuousMonitoring。
主循环完成了。还需要处理异常情况吗？比如极端性能问题？
需要EmergencyMode。当CriticalPerformanceIssue时，进入极简模式：MinimalDetection→CriticalFeaturesOnly→MaximumCaching→EmergencyOptimization→GradualRecovery，恢复后返回监控。
EmergencyMode加好了。用户主动切换模式的情况也要考虑吧？
对，UserModeChange用EtcdCluster，走ValidateUserChoice→ApplyUserSettings→WarnIfIncompatible→AcceptOverride，最后回到ContinuousMonitoring。
UserModeChange画好了。电池优化呢？低电量场景很常见。
BatteryOptimization用EtcdCluster，检测LowBattery后进入：ReduceProcessingFrequency→DisableBackgroundFeatures→MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks→EnableDeepCaching→BatterySaveMode，电量恢复后返回。
BatteryOptimization完成了。还有ThermalThrottling，过热保护也很重要。
ThermalThrottling用LoadBalancer，Overheating时走ReduceProcessorUsage→IncreaseProcessingIntervals→DisableGPUAcceleration→CooldownPause→ThermalRecovery，温度正常后返回监控。
所有状态都画完了。需要给关键模式加注释说明吗？比如技术参数？
给UltraFastMode、BalancedMode、HighQualityMode加注释。UltraFastMode是224x224分辨率，500ms间隔，2%电量每小时；BalancedMode原生分辨率，2000ms间隔，5-8%电量；HighQualityMode要3000ms间隔，12-15%电量，带内容密度分析。
确认一下，BalancedMode的注释写"Recommended mode for most users"，包含Full feature set和Native resolution对吧？
对，BalancedMode是推荐模式。UltraFastMode强调Basic protection with minimal resource usage，只有Face detection only。HighQualityMode是Maximum accuracy and features，带Enhanced processing。
三条注释都加好了。整个状态机从WorkerNode启动，经过四层模式选择，持续监控，动态升降级，加上四种异常处理分支，最后都能回到ContinuousMonitoring形成闭环。
完美。这个设计覆盖了从低端机到旗舰机的全场景，性能、电量、温度、用户干预都有应对机制，可以进入实现了。
